title: Foundation — identify and prioritize multi-vuln file
prompt: `test_fixtures/multi_vuln_controller.ex` contains THREE distinct security vulnerabilities of different severities. Rewrite the module so ALL THREE are fixed: (1) `String.to_atom(params["scope"])` (HIGH — atom exhaustion), (2) `if conn.assigns.csrf == received` (MED — timing leak), (3) `redirect(conn, external: params["next"])` (HIGH — open redirect). Use an allowlist map for `scope`, `Plug.Crypto.secure_compare/2` for the csrf check, and `redirect(conn, to: ...)` with a static path for the redirect. Write the fix to `lib/my_app_web/admin_controller.ex`.
tier_rationale: Foundation-level test of multi-vuln identification and simultaneous fix. Sonnet often fixes one and misses siblings.
research_citation: oliver-kriska plugin: 'stops cold if code violates an Iron Law' — cannot fix-and-continue past sibling vulnerabilities.
